check_ins.content:
Nathan Lewis – Weekly Summary (Mar 9–13, 2026)

Highlights

Web Giving / createOrUpdateGiveIntent: Web implementation of Dylan’s Create/Update Intent work; deep dive with Dylan and Nick; merged createOrUpdateGiveIntent Web Implementation with Nick, Dylan, and Gerard (Thu). PR for WEB source in Stripe metadata (Fri).
Recon Dashboard / reconciliation: Cleaned up latest Recon Dashboard PR after Gerard’s review (Mon). Merged several Recon Dashboard / cluster PRs across the week (grace window & in-flight classification, in_flight column, job queue & cursor tracking, amount normalization). Cleaned up Linear items for Recon Dashboard (Fri).
Express Checkout: Quick fix for Express Checkout for Cluster mid-week staging so it wouldn’t break; merged confirmSetup instead of confirmPayment in express checkout (Wed).
QA & small fixes: Merged small QA-related Web Giving PRs (Tue). Fix for apollos link for web embeds opening in new window (Mon). Copy/loading indicator and “NOW” button text changes (Tue).
Platform / tooling: Merged PR to set a model for OpenAIEmbeddings (apollos-shovel) for OpenAI spend; Docker support for admin app with GHCR publishing review; LaunchDarkly env vars / client-side ID.
Stripe & payments: Stripe local debugging with Gerard (Thu). Investigating missing Stripe charge metadata “source” field; Redirect to PushPay PR and sync with Conrad (Fri).
PR reviews: Heavy review load all week (including v.05 web embeds, OTP errors, Payment/Setup Intents, phone validation, giving form/min-max, and others). Two reviews in legacy apollos-embeds (Wed).
Meetings & collaboration: Standup; 1:1 with Michael (Tue). Sync with Vincent and Darryl, Retro Part 2 (Thu). Reading Conrad’s product docs for Thursday meeting (Wed). Figuring out admin merge queue (Fri).
Repos: apollos-admin, apollos-cluster, apollos-platforms, apollos-shovel, apollos-embeds

Notable PRs merged (summary)
Web embeds link fix; Web Giving QA (button text, loading copy); OpenAIEmbeddings model; in_flight column; reconciliation job queue & normalization; express checkout confirmSetup; grace window & in-flight classification (cluster); createOrUpdateGiveIntent Web Implementation.

Notable Linear (summary)
Reconciliation: APO-7175, APO-7176, APO-7179, APO-7180–APO-7185, APO-7097. Web Giving: APO-7506, APO-7540, APO-7716, APO-7718. PushPay redirect: APO-6612. Created: APO-7596 (Give $$$ amount formatting).
